reasoning: The Wikipedia 'FIDE rankings' page draws its data from the official FIDE monthly lists. A 1% increase requires her to hit at least 2500 (since 2475 * 1.01 = 2499.75). While she recently gained 25 points in October to reach 2475, gaining another 25 points within a short period is highly improbable for an established player. No major scheduled tournaments for her in November have been found, pushing the Dec 23 projection to a very low probability. By February 2026, there is slightly more time for her to potentially play and perform exceptionally well, so uncertainty increases marginally, bounded overall by the statistical difficulty of such a leap.
